recommendations.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
recommendations.overview: Per her mother's last wish, an 8 year old girl sets out to reunite her father with his college best friend who was in love with him.

recommendations.title: Student Of The Year
recommendations.overview: Several alumni reminisce about their final year at St. Theresa's College and the events that shaped their lives.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Khan
recommendations.overview: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his conditio

recommendations.title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
recommendations.overview: Years after his father disowns his adopted brother for marrying a woman of lower social standing, a young man goes on a mission to reunite his family.

recommendations.title: Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna
recommendations.overview: Dev and Maya are both married to different people. Settled into a life of domestic ritual, and convinced that they are happy in their respective relationships, they still yearn for something deeper and more meaningful, which is precisely what they fi

recommendations.title: Lust Stories
recommendations.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.
recommendations.director: Karan Johar, Zoya Akhtar, Anurag Kashyap, Dibakar Banerjee

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.
